message:
perf(fnp-ufunc): optimize general broadcast odometer paths

Add specialized fast paths for all three odometer-based broadcast cases:
- lhs.shape == out_shape fallback (rhs uses odometer)
- rhs.shape == out_shape fallback (lhs uses odometer)
- General case (both lhs and rhs use odometers)

For each path:
- Hoist geterr().is_all_ignore() check outside the loop
- Add skip-error-check branch using direct operators (+/-/*//)
- Specialize loops for Add/Sub/Mul/Div to avoid op.apply() dispatch
- Use macro to deduplicate odometer increment logic

This completes the broadcast optimization work started in a69e072,
targeting the 30-50x slowdown for general broadcast scenarios in
cross-engine benchmarks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
